tr.td: No components found for this BOM

div.div: Note: This report shows the initial costing estimates from Stage 1.

tr.td: No components found for this BOM

div.div: Note: This report shows the reviewed estimates from Stage 2.

tr.td: No components found for this BOM

div.div: Note: This report contains the final costing estimates before management approval.

div.h4: Approved Stage - BOM Lines with Components

Estimated (Stage 1) (Stage 2) (Stage 3)
Grand Total Cost:
Grand Total Sales:

t.t-if: not ((doc.quotation_approval == 'stage1' and line.sqa_stage1_bom_id and line.sqa_stage1_bom_id.bom_line_ids) or (doc.quotation_approval == 'stage2' and line.sqa_stage2_bom_id and line.sqa_stage2_bom_id.bom_line_ids) or (doc.quotation_approval == 'stage3' and line.sqa_stage3_bom_id and line.sqa_stage3_bom_id.bom_line_ids))

t.div: No estimated BOM lines found. Please select an approval stage first.

t.div: No actual BOM lines loaded. Please add actual BOM lines in the "Actual - BOM Lines" tab.
